# 📦 Installation

### Required

- [Spell Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine "")

### Strongly recommended

- [Jewelry](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry) some relics are made out of jewelery gems
- [Combat Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-roll) some relics provide Roll related perks

# 🔮 Features

Obtain powerful trinkets, to boost your spells, and combat skills. Explore 40+ unique pieces, all with different perks and artwork.

A few of these are craftable from [Jewelry](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry) gems.

![Relic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BDQucwF0/images/67352af2badb6223b080eb77810606006762d7b8.png)

Most of the items are available to obtain from dungeon chests, demi-bosses (such as Evoker), and bosses (such as Wither and Ender Dragon).

Loot table injections are configurable in `config/rpg_series/loot_items.json`.

![Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BDQucwF0/images/32ad6bdd15dcef53148d1b00aa76ae913be421f7.png)

# ⭐️ Examples

Explore a wide variety of active and passive skills provided by these relics.
